speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational conflict of hiding her pain to maintain peace.
text: Ghar ki shanti banaye rakhne ke liye aap apne sabse gehre dard ko chhupa kar sab kuch akele seh rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chupchap ek ideal bahu ka natak karti rehti hoon

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to gently name the implied fear of the family falling apart.
text: Aapke andar ye darr baitha hai ki ek choti si sachai bahar aane se poore ghar ka mahaul aur izzat bikhar jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyuki meri pehchaan aisi hai jo is samaj ko manzoor nahi. Agar sasural walo ko pata chala ki main past mein ek ladki ke saath thi, toh woh mujhe nikal denge. Ye stigma mujhe andar hi andar khaa raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chupchap ek ideal bahu ka natak karti rehti hoon
text: Bahut bhari hai. Subah laptop kholne se pehle sasu-maa ki dawai, breakfast sab dekhna hota hai. Wahan office mein manager ka pressure. Un sabke samne main bas chupchap ek ideal bahu ka natak karti rehti hoon, taaki kisi ko shaq na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror the role and duty framework hiding her distress.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking an open question about how she manages the contrast between internal pain and external performance.
text: Jab aap is tarah akele bathroom mein roti hain aur phir bahar aakar sab normal dikhati hain, toh us waqt aap khud ko kaise sambhalti hain?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chupchap ek ideal bahu ka natak karti rehti hoon
text: Bas ek gehri saans leti hoon aur apne aansu ponch kar chehre par ek fake smile laga leti hoon. Fir wahi routine. Parivaar ki shanti bani rahe, bas isliye chupchap ek ideal bahu ka natak karti rehti hoon, bhale hi main andar se bilkul toot chuki hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational sacrifice she makes for the family's peace.
text: Apno ki khushi aur ghar ki shanti ki keemat aapko apne wajood aur apni khushi ki kurbaani dekar chukani pad rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exact wahi. Kurbaani hi toh hai. Mujhe lagta hai mera apna koi astitva hi nahi bacha hai. Na main office mein puri tarah focus kar paati hoon, na is ghar mein meri asli pehchaan ki koi jagah hai. Main bilkul akeli pad gayi hoon is bhare poore parivaar mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the deep feeling of ISOLATION resulting from hiding her identity in the family.
text: Lagta hai is bhare poore ghar aur office ki bheed mein, sabki ummeedein poori karte karte aap ek gehre ISOLATION mein chali gayi hain, jahan aapko samajhne wala koi nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Yahan koi nahi samjhega. Agar galti se bhi hint mil gaya toh 'log kya kahenge' wali baat shuru ho jayegi. Meri apni identity se zyada inke liye samaj mein unka status matter karta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her isolation as a common consequence of societal expectations and separating her worth from it.
text: Aapka ye akelapan aur ghutan mehsoos karna bilkul laazmi hai. Humari society mein 'log kya kahenge' ka bojh aur bahu se ummeedein itni zyada hoti hain ki kisi ko bhi apni asli pehchaan chhupani pad sakti hai, isme aapki koi galti nahi hai.

text: Thank you. Mujhe kabhi kabhi lagta tha ki main shayad selfish hoon jo apne baare mein soch rahi hoon. Sasu-maa bimar rehti hain, unka dhyan rakhna mera farz hai, aur main unhe dukh nahi dena chahti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a brief systemic anecdote about working women to normalize the suppression of emotions.
text: Working women ki life mein apne emotions ko duty ke peechhe daba dena bahut common hai — sirf tumhara struggle nahi hai, lekin iske baare mein koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki humari parvarish mein hi auraton ko sacrifice karna sikhaya jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sacrifice ki toh jaise aadat si ho gayi hai. Par thak gayi hoon ab. Office deadlines aur ghar ke kaamo ke beech main khud ko kho chuki hoon. Ye safar lamba lagne laga hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the exhaustion of enduring this dual life for a long time.
text: Itne saalon se bina kisi complaint ke lagatar ye dohari zindagi jeena aur sab kuch akele manage karna aapko andar se khokhla kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... ab aur himmat nahi bachi aise hi ghoot-ghoot ke jeene ki. Parivaar ko bhi nahi tod sakti aur khud ko bhi aur nahi mita sakti. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka... koi raasta hai kya is ghutan ko thoda kam karne ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, culturally safe options that fit into her busy schedule as a working woman.
text: Aapke routine ko dekhte hue do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain: Ya toh roz raat ko soney se pehle 5 minute apne phone ke notes app mein apne asli feelings likh kar lock kar dein, ya fir office commute ke time kisi anonymous online LGBTQ community mein sirf padhne ya baat karne ka time nikaalein. Dono mein se kuch feasible lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Office commute wala idea thoda safe lag raha hai. Metro mein mere paas aadha ghanta hota hai jab main akeli hoti hoon. Wahan main phone par anonymous forum check kar sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking her step-by-step through setting up the anonymous account during her commute.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki kal subah metro mein baithne ke baad ek safe anonymous forum search karo… phir wahan ek fake naam se account banao… bas itna hi kal ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Okay, account banane mein toh zyadatar 2 minute lagenge. Kam se kam wahan koi mujhe judge nahi karega aur na hi mere ghar walo tak baat pahuchegi. Ye toh main kal hi kar lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the creation of a secret space as a necessary structural tool in a rigid culture.
text: Aise traditional family setups mein jahan izzat sabse upar hoti hai, ek gupt jagah banana khud ko mehfooz rakhne ka ek zaroori structural tareeqa hai, ye koi dhokha nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the shift from feeling like a bad person to finding balance in relationships.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein. Pehli baar is topic par kisi se itni khul kar baat karke bohot halka mehsoos ho raha hai. Aisa lag raha tha jaise ye raaz mujhe andar se jalaa dega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror how opening up eased the burden of her duties.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing finding small moments of respite as a healthy structural response to the pressure on working women.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror moving past the fear and starting anew.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore the tension between her internal suppression and her role as a sanskari bahu.
text: Apne is andar ke sach aur ek aadarsh bahu bane rehne ki majboori ke beech, aap is bhari conflict ko kaise jhel rahi hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kaise jhel rahi hoon? Bas khud ko maar kar. Ek taraf mera promotion aur meri true identity hai, dusri taraf samaj ki thoo-thoo ka darr. Mujhe lagta hai main sabse alag-thalag pad gayi hoon, jaise is bhari hui joint family mein mera koi apna hai hi nahi jo mujhe sach mein samjhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the core feeling of ISOLATION specific to C6 and Relational Preservation.
text: Lagta hai is dual life ko maintain karne ki wajah se, aur sabki nazron mein theek bane rehne ke chakkar mein aap bohot gehra ISOLATION aur akelapan mehsoos kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi pakda aapne. Bheed mein akelapan hai. Office ki meetings ke baad jab ghar ki bell bajati hoon, toh face par ek jhuthi smile chipka leti hoon. Koi dekhega toh kahega 'perfect life', par andar se mujhe itna guilt hota hai ki main apni hi sachchai se bhag rahi hoon, apni marzi se jee nahi pa rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her isolation as a culturally normal response to hiding her identity in a dual-burden role.
text: Jab ek working aurat par khandaan ki izzat aur ek sanskari bahu banne ka itna pressure ho, toh apni pehchaan chupane par ye akelapan aur guilt mehsoos hona bohot swabhavik hai. Hamare samaj mein dohari zimmedariyan nibhana asaan nahi hota, par iska bilkul ye matlab nahi ki aapki true identity galat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pata nahi. Biradari mein itne taane milte hain working auraton ko. Meri chachi saas humesha kehti hain 'aurat ka asli roop ghar sambhalne mein hai'. Aise mahol mein main agar apne suppressed ambition aur apne true self ko samne laungi, toh mere maa baap ki parvarish par keechad uchla jayega. Ye soch kar hi kaanp jati hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a brief systemic anecdote highlighting that hiding identity for family peace is common but unspoken.
text: Hamare samaj mein aisi dual burden wali auraton ke liye ye guilt aur identity chupana bahut common hai—sirf aapka nahi, lekin koi bahar bolega nahi kyunki 'log kya kahenge' ka darr har kisi ko akele jhelne par majboor kar deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Log kya kahenge... yahi ek line toh meri zindagi chala rahi hai. Kabhi kabhi itna bebus mehsoos karti hoon ki lagta hai bas sab kuch chhod kar kahin door chali jaun jahan sirf main hoon, aur meri office ki file aur shanti ho. Par phir family ki shakal yaad aati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Hold the phase and mirror the relational impossibility of breaking free without hurting the family.
text: Ek taraf aapko ek shant, apne liye jeene wali zindagi ki khwaish hoti hai, par dusri taraf parivaar ke rishton ki dor aapko wapis usi chakravyuh mein kheench lati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yahi chakravyuh hai. Main is ghar ko nahi chhod sakti, par main roz khud ko ghut-ghut ke marna bhi nahi chahti. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, kya main thodi shanti ke liye kuch chota sa badlaav kar sakti hoon jo unki nazron mein na aaye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide 2 options that fit within her dual-burden duties, <10 mins, safe.
text: Chaliye kuch aise chote kadam dekhte hain jo aapke is tight schedule mein aasaani se shamil ho sakein. Aap chahein toh office se aate waqt 10 minute cab ya car mein sirf apne liye chupchap baith sakti hain bina kisi kaam ke, ya phir subah jaldi uth kar apne thoughts ek private digital journal mein likh sakti hain jisse kisi ko pata na chale.

speaker: Seeker
text: Car mein 10 minute baithna shayad utna effective na ho kyunki wahan bhi phone bajta rehta hai 'kahan pohnchi, dinner ka kya hai'. Digital journal wali baat acchi lag rahi hai. Laptop password protected hota hai office ka, toh usmein likhna safe rahega. Par usmein shuru kaise karu?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the journaling suggestion step by step safely.
text: Pehle apne laptop par ek aisi secure file ya app open karein jise sirf aap access kar sakein... phir usme bas din bhar ki sabse bhari feeling ka ek shabd likhein... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye main kar sakti hoon. Ek shabd likhna utna thakane wala nahi hoga. Kam se kam mere andar ki us suppressed identity ko din mein ek pal ke liye hi sahi, koi azaad jagah toh milegi. Mujhe itna guilty nahi lagega shayad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe regarding the guilt, normalising her ambition and identity against societal control.
text: Yeh yaad rakhna zaroori hai ki jise aap 'guilt' ya 'thoo-thoo' ka darr man rahi hain, wo darasal in traditional roles aur patriarchal samaj ki banayi hui maryadaon ka result hai, ye aapki koi niji kami ya swarth nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Patriarchal samaj ka banaya hua darr... Ye sunkar sach mein thoda burden kam hua. Main humesha khud ko hi kosti thi ki main ek buri bahu hoon aur buri beti hoon kyunki mujhe apna career aur apna space itna pasand hai. Par ab nazariya badal raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the release of long-held feared consequences of being a 'bad' daughter/in-law (Lens E).
text: Apne is guilt ko ek naye lens se dekhne par aisa lag raha hai ki jo darr aapko andar hi andar kha raha tha, wo dheere dheere apni pakad chhod raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main shikayat nahi karti
text: Bilkul. Main kal se hi us digital diary mein likhna shuru karungi. Agar main thoda bhi shanti se apni identity ko process kar payi, toh main better feel karungi. Main shikayat nahi karti thi pehle bhi, par aaj aapko bata kar accha laga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her resilience and brave step to find a safe space for herself amidst her dual role.
text: Apni is andar ki uljhan ko samajhne ki koshish aur ek secure space banane ka faisla, aapki himmat aur resilience ko darshata hai, jo aap itne bade dual-burden ke baad bhi barkarar rakhe hue hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Mujhe sach mein is ek naye perspective ki sakht zaroorat thi. Ab shaam ho rahi hai, mujhe jaldi se laptop band karke rasoi ka kaam dekhna hoga warna saas ji pareshan ho jayengi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how she is gracefully shifting back to her daily duties (Lens B).
text: Is choti si raahat ke pal ke baad, aap samajhdari se dobara apne ghar ki un rozana zimmedariyon ki taraf laut rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, wo duties toh nibhani hi padengi. Par ab thodi se farak ke sath. Kam se kam mere dimag mein wo clear lakshman rekha banne lagi hai ki mera office, mera passion aur meri identity galat nahi hain. Wo bas is ghar ke current mahaul mein fit nahi hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe about smart redirection and preserving identity invisibly.
text: Apni pehchaan ko samaj ki is dual-burden vyavastha mein seedhe takrane ki jagah, use ek safe aur private jagah par zinda rakhna ek behad samajhdari bhara tareeqa hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Main bas usi safe space ko zinda rakhungi. Main aapse baat karke halka mehsoos kar rahi hoon. Ek bojh sa utar gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the shift from long-standing hopelessness to lightness (Lens D).
text: Itne lambe samay ki is andruni ghutan ke baad, ye halkeapan ka ehsaas apne aap mein ek bohot badi azaadi jaisa lag raha hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Mujhe ummeed nahi thi ki koi mujhe bina judge kiye is tarah sunega. Sab log ya toh career chhodne bolte hain ya family. Aise balance banana aur meri suppressed ambition ko validate karna mere liye bahut badi baat hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her strength and understanding of her situation.
text: Aap jaisi auraton ka is mushkil paristithi mein bhi itna balance aur dignity banaye rakhna sachmuch qabil-e-tareef hai, aur main aapke is sangharsh ki poori izzat karta hoon.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki inn baaton ne mera din bana diya. Main ab sach mein jaati hoon, sabji kaatni hai dinner ke liye. Apna samay dene ke liye shukriya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational care she is now equipped to provide (Lens C).
text: Apni is nayi takat ko ikkatha karke, ab aap apne parivaar ki dekhbhal karne ke liye wapas ja rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, wahi zindagi hai abhi ke liye. Agar aage chalkar mujhe fir se wahi akelepan ne ghera, toh kya main dobara yahan aakar baat kar sakti hoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide warm final closing confirming ongoing availability.
text: Main aapke liye yahan hamesha maujood rahunga, jab bhi aapko thode se sukoon ya baat karne ki zarurat ho, aap bina kisi darr ke laut sakti hain; tab tak apna khayal rakhiyega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon
text: Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon. Wedding miss hone ka gham toh hai par usse bada darr Section 377 ke legacy fear aur 'divorce stigma' ka hai jo mujhe apni sacchai bolne nahi deta. Main office aur ghar ke beech pis rahi hoon par phir bhi sasural walon ke samne muskurati hoon taaki unhe lage ki unki bahu bohot khush hai. Apni feelings ko bilkul dafan kar rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational burden of hiding her identity to keep her family happy, ending softly due to stigma cue.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki sasural ki khushi aur shanti banaye rakhne ki khatir, aap khud ke andar ek bohot bada aur akela sach chhupaye rakhne par majboor hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon
text: Majboori hi hai. Office ki itni meetings khatam karke jab main ghar aati hoon toh wahi ek perfect bahu ka mask pehnna padta hai. Agar meri identity bahar aayi toh kitna bada kalesh hoga main bata nahi sakti. Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the continuous duration of her daily act across both spheres.
text: Donon jagah ki zimmedariyan nibhate hue, subah se lekar raat tak har din is mask ko pehne rakhna aapko andar hi andar bohot thaka raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Thakan se kahin zyada mujhe us legacy fear se darr lagta hai. Law bhale badal gaya ho, par logon ki soch toh nahi badli na. Ek MNC me kaam karne wali 'bahu' agar queer nikle, toh family poori tarah society ki nazron mein tabah ho jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the feared consequence of family destruction, pausing for stigma.
text: Samaj ke in taanon aur family ke bikhar jaane ke us gehre darr se, aapne apni asli pehchaan ko bilkul daba sa diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Dabana hi padega. Mere khud ke parents kya kahenge biradari mein? Divorce stigma humare jaise pariwaaron mein life khatam hone ke barabar hai. Meri khud ki toh koi life hi nahi bachi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Inviting her to explore the emotional weight of living with this hidden reality.
text: Itne saare kamo aur apne apno ke darr ke beech, jab aap kisi waqt akele hote ho toh yeh ghutan aapko kaisa mehsoos karwati hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon
text: Akele mein toh bas lagta hai jaise kisi pinjre mein band hoon jahan se nikli toh sab kuch tabah ho jayega. Koi apna sa nahi lagta. Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon aur iss jhoot ne mujhe bahut akela kar diya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the core conflict of isolation that stems from protecting family honor.
text: Jab aap yeh kehti hain, toh mujhe lagta hai ki is jhoot ko akele sambhalte hue aur sabki izzat bachate hue aap ek bohot gehri ISOLATION mehsoos kar rahi hain, jahan aapka dard share karne wala koi nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Koi hai hi nahi! Office mein mere colleagues sochte hain 'newly married, she is so lucky', aur ghar aake sabko lagta hai ki bahu set hai. Kisi ko nahi pata ki main andar se kitni dabi hui hoon is closeted life mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her feelings of fear and isolation as a structural issue for working queer women in traditional homes.
text: Ek working professional aur bahu ke dohre farz nibhate hue, upar se apni pehchaan chhupane ka dabaav sehna sach mein bohot exhaust karne wala hai, aur isme darr ya akelapan mehsoos karna bilkul swabhavik hai; yeh kashmakash aapki kaabiliyat ya achai ko kam nahi karti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap theek keh rahe ho. Par is darr ka main kya karun? Kabhi kabhi lagta hai shayad mujhme hi koi khot hai. Agar mere parents ko pata chala toh unka maan mitti mein mil jayega. Yeh guilt har waqt khata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to reflect her guilt over potentially hurting her parents, pausing for stigma.
text: Apne apno ko us takleef se bachane ki chahat mein, aap bina wajah khud ko hi is poori situation ka doshi maan rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon
text: Haan, kyunki agar main unke hisaab se normal hoti toh yeh double life nahi jeeni padti. Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon, aur kai baar office washroom mein ja kar bas akele roti rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a systemic anecdote normalising the double life burden for marginalized identities.
text: Aise traditional mahaul mein apni sacchi identity ko le kar darr aur guilt mein peesna bohot common hai — sirf tumhara akele ka yeh haal nahi hai, lekin koi is par khul kar bolega nahi kyunki society mein alag hone ko le kar ab bhi kaafi kalank juda hua hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho aap. Par ab thak chuki hoon is constant anxiety aur ghutan se. Main apni family ko nahi chhod sakti aur na hi unhe sach bata sakti hoon. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka... batao kya karoon main apne mind ko thoda shant karne ke liye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, covert actions she can take at work or home to process her emotions.
text: Is ghutan ke beech hum choti aisi raahat dhoondhne ki koshish kar sakte hain jo kisi ko pata na chale. Jab aap office mein overwhelmed feel karein, toh kya lunch ke baad 5 minute akele building compound mein chal sakti hain? Ya phir raat ko phone par ek locked digital diary mein apne asli jazbaat likh sakti hain? Dono mein se kya feasible lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Diary likhna toh bada risk hai, agar kisi ne phone check kar liya toh divorce stigma seedhe mere saamne aa jayega. Haa, office mein lunch ke baad 5 minute bahar building mein chalna kaafi safe aur aasan lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the brief walk suggestion into a simple daily step.
text: Chaliye fir hum sirf isi choti si koshish se shuruaat karte hain. Pehle kal lunch ke baad bina phone dekhe 5 minute akele walk ke liye niklo… phir wahan bas ek lambi saans lekar us pal mein sirf khud ki sachaai mehsoos karo… bas itna hi kal ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon
text: Yeh main kar sakti hoon. Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon, toh kam se kam wo 5 minute office ki us bheed mein sirf aur sirf mere apne honge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing this small solitary moment as vital resistance to structural silencing.
text: Apni sacchai ko dafan karne ka yeh dabaav humari in kathin societal expectations ka nateeja hai; aise mahaul mein khud ko diye gaye yeh 5 minute chupchap apne astitva ko zinda rakhne ka ek bohot zaroori hissa ban jate hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach kaha. Mujhe laga tha ki shaadi ke baad main shayad sab manage kar lungi ek ideal bahu ki tarah, aur sab bhool jaungi. Par apni identity ko itni aasani se dimag se mara nahi jaa sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to highlight the clash between her prescribed duty and true self.
text: Jab hum kisi anjaane naye role ko poori nishtha se nibhane ki koshish karte hain, toh bhi apni us buniyadi asal identity ko bhula dena namumkin hi hota hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Mushkil hi nahi, ghutan hoti hai har waqt. Us legacy fear ki wajah se main bahar kisi support group mein bhi nahi ja sakti. Kya pata wahan koi pehchan le? Yeh duniya itni choti aur cruel hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the feared consequence of being discovered, using short form for stigma cue.
text: Kisi jaane-pehchaane ke wahan mil jaane ke darr se, aap us itne bade akelepan mein koi madad bhi nahi maang paa rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Nahi maang sakti. Agar main pakdi gayi toh mere sasural wale seedhe parents pe ungli uthayenge. Par chalo, kam se kam aaj aapse sab khul ke baat karke thoda weight zarur utar gaya hai dil se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her resilience in handling the immense pressure to protect her family.
text: Yeh baat sun kar mujhe bhi tasalli mili ki aapko thodi raahat aayi; sach kahun toh itne bhaari samajik dabaav aur parivaar ke maan ki fikar ke beech, aap jis himmat ke sath chal rahi hain, woh bohot kaabile tareef hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon
text: Main puri koshish karungi kal office walk wale chhote plan pe theek se dhyaan du. Pata nahi ye long-term mein kaise work karega. Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon, shayad kisi din sab theek kar pau khud ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror her focus on the immediate present rather than the long-term burden.
text: Bhavishya ka bojh thodi der ke liye aage ke dino par chhod kar, abhi filhal aap sirf apne kal ke din ko thoda behtar banane par dhyan de rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, abhi itna aage ka nahi soch sakti. Mere office ka workload bhi peak pe hai, ek taraf wahan deadlines aur ek taraf shaam ko ghar jaane ka darr jahan perfect bahu banna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror the relentless duties in both spheres of her life.
text: Donon tarf ke in anjaam tak pahunchne wale kathin farzon ko poora karte hue, aapko kahin bhi aaram se baithne ki mohlat nahi mil rahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Mohlat toh bilkul nahi hai. Par jab kal se main office building mein thodi der akele walk karungi, toh shayad main wapas apne bare mein kuch free minutes enjoy kar pau. Usse mind zaroor reset hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to reflect her rekindling of a gentle relationship with herself.
text: Mujhe khushi hai ki us bheed bhaad aur dusron ke rishton ki uljhanon se dur, aap khud ke saath ek pyar bhara chhota sa rishta dobara banane ja rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Khud se toh rishta jaise toot hi gaya tha. Office aati thi, ghar jaati thi, aur jhoot bolti thi. Ab shayad thodi tasalli mile jab main apne bare mein bina kisi external judgement ke sochungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing this act of non-judgmental self-time as a tool for surviving structural pressures.
text: Apne roz ki itni bhaag-daud mein khud ko yeh bina kisi faisle ya guilt ke thoda waqt dena, is sakht samajik dabaav mein apne aap ko thoda sambhale rakhne ka sach mein sabse zaroori tareeqa hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you is itne supportive conversation ke liye. Mujhse aaj ye baatein share karke lagta hai ki kam se kam ek jagah main bina apna mask pehne free hoon. Ab main log off karke ghar ki duties sambhalti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to highlight her relief from the feared judgment in this safe space.
text: Aapke is bharose ke liye bohot shukriya; sach mein yeh bohot raahat ki baat hai ki yahan aap us badnaami ya judge kiye jaane ke darr se poori tarah azaad mehsoos kar payi...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon
text: Haan, bilkul sachi azaadi lagi thodi der ke liye. Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon, par yahan aa kar ek sach bol paayi. Apna dhyan rakhna, bye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to conclude by acknowledging the transition from her long duration of hiding to these new moments of peace.
text: Apne in chote naye aaram aur sachaai ke palo ke sath apna aage ka lamba waqt thoda asaan banayen, aur aap bhi apna khayal rakhiye.

text: Itne saare kamo aur apne apno ke darr ke beech, jab aap kisi waqt akele hote ho toh yeh ghutan aapko kaisa mehsoos karwati hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon
text: Akele mein toh bas lagta hai jaise kisi pinjre mein band hoon jahan se nikli toh sab kuch tabah ho jayega. Koi apna sa nahi lagta. Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon aur iss jhoot ne mujhe bahut akela kar diya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the core conflict of isolation that stems from protecting family honor.
text: Jab aap yeh kehti hain, toh mujhe lagta hai ki is jhoot ko akele sambhalte hue aur sabki izzat bachate hue aap ek bohot gehri ISOLATION mehsoos kar rahi hain, jahan aapka dard share karne wala koi nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Koi hai hi nahi! Office mein mere colleagues sochte hain 'newly married, she is so lucky', aur ghar aake sabko lagta hai ki bahu set hai. Kisi ko nahi pata ki main andar se kitni dabi hui hoon is closeted life mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her feelings of fear and isolation as a structural issue for working queer women in traditional homes.
text: Ek working professional aur bahu ke dohre farz nibhate hue, upar se apni pehchaan chhupane ka dabaav sehna sach mein bohot exhaust karne wala hai, aur isme darr ya akelapan mehsoos karna bilkul swabhavik hai; yeh kashmakash aapki kaabiliyat ya achai ko kam nahi karti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap theek keh rahe ho. Par is darr ka main kya karun? Kabhi kabhi lagta hai shayad mujhme hi koi khot hai. Agar mere parents ko pata chala toh unka maan mitti mein mil jayega. Yeh guilt har waqt khata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to reflect her guilt over potentially hurting her parents, pausing for stigma.
text: Apne apno ko us takleef se bachane ki chahat mein, aap bina wajah khud ko hi is poori situation ka doshi maan rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon
text: Haan, kyunki agar main unke hisaab se normal hoti toh yeh double life nahi jeeni padti. Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon, aur kai baar office washroom mein ja kar bas akele roti rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a systemic anecdote normalising the double life burden for marginalized identities.
text: Aise traditional mahaul mein apni sacchi identity ko le kar darr aur guilt mein peesna bohot common hai — sirf tumhara akele ka yeh haal nahi hai, lekin koi is par khul kar bolega nahi kyunki society mein alag hone ko le kar ab bhi kaafi kalank juda hua hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho aap. Par ab thak chuki hoon is constant anxiety aur ghutan se. Main apni family ko nahi chhod sakti aur na hi unhe sach bata sakti hoon. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka... batao kya karoon main apne mind ko thoda shant karne ke liye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, covert actions she can take at work or home to process her emotions.
text: Is ghutan ke beech hum choti aisi raahat dhoondhne ki koshish kar sakte hain jo kisi ko pata na chale. Jab aap office mein overwhelmed feel karein, toh kya lunch ke baad 5 minute akele building compound mein chal sakti hain? Ya phir raat ko phone par ek locked digital diary mein apne asli jazbaat likh sakti hain? Dono mein se kya feasible lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Diary likhna toh bada risk hai, agar kisi ne phone check kar liya toh divorce stigma seedhe mere saamne aa jayega. Haa, office mein lunch ke baad 5 minute bahar building mein chalna kaafi safe aur aasan lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the brief walk suggestion into a simple daily step.
text: Chaliye fir hum sirf isi choti si koshish se shuruaat karte hain. Pehle kal lunch ke baad bina phone dekhe 5 minute akele walk ke liye niklo… phir wahan bas ek lambi saans lekar us pal mein sirf khud ki sachaai mehsoos karo… bas itna hi kal ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon
text: Yeh main kar sakti hoon. Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon, toh kam se kam wo 5 minute office ki us bheed mein sirf aur sirf mere apne honge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing this small solitary moment as vital resistance to structural silencing.
text: Apni sacchai ko dafan karne ka yeh dabaav humari in kathin societal expectations ka nateeja hai; aise mahaul mein khud ko diye gaye yeh 5 minute chupchap apne astitva ko zinda rakhne ka ek bohot zaroori hissa ban jate hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach kaha. Mujhe laga tha ki shaadi ke baad main shayad sab manage kar lungi ek ideal bahu ki tarah, aur sab bhool jaungi. Par apni identity ko itni aasani se dimag se mara nahi jaa sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to highlight the clash between her prescribed duty and true self.
text: Jab hum kisi anjaane naye role ko poori nishtha se nibhane ki koshish karte hain, toh bhi apni us buniyadi asal identity ko bhula dena namumkin hi hota hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Mushkil hi nahi, ghutan hoti hai har waqt. Us legacy fear ki wajah se main bahar kisi support group mein bhi nahi ja sakti. Kya pata wahan koi pehchan le? Yeh duniya itni choti aur cruel hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the feared consequence of being discovered, using short form for stigma cue.
text: Kisi jaane-pehchaane ke wahan mil jaane ke darr se, aap us itne bade akelepan mein koi madad bhi nahi maang paa rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Nahi maang sakti. Agar main pakdi gayi toh mere sasural wale seedhe parents pe ungli uthayenge. Par chalo, kam se kam aaj aapse sab khul ke baat karke thoda weight zarur utar gaya hai dil se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her resilience in handling the immense pressure to protect her family.
text: Yeh baat sun kar mujhe bhi tasalli mili ki aapko thodi raahat aayi; sach kahun toh itne bhaari samajik dabaav aur parivaar ke maan ki fikar ke beech, aap jis himmat ke sath chal rahi hain, woh bohot kaabile tareef hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon
text: Main puri koshish karungi kal office walk wale chhote plan pe theek se dhyaan du. Pata nahi ye long-term mein kaise work karega. Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon, shayad kisi din sab theek kar pau khud ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror her focus on the immediate present rather than the long-term burden.
text: Bhavishya ka bojh thodi der ke liye aage ke dino par chhod kar, abhi filhal aap sirf apne kal ke din ko thoda behtar banane par dhyan de rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, abhi itna aage ka nahi soch sakti. Mere office ka workload bhi peak pe hai, ek taraf wahan deadlines aur ek taraf shaam ko ghar jaane ka darr jahan perfect bahu banna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror the relentless duties in both spheres of her life.
text: Donon tarf ke in anjaam tak pahunchne wale kathin farzon ko poora karte hue, aapko kahin bhi aaram se baithne ki mohlat nahi mil rahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Mohlat toh bilkul nahi hai. Par jab kal se main office building mein thodi der akele walk karungi, toh shayad main wapas apne bare mein kuch free minutes enjoy kar pau. Usse mind zaroor reset hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to reflect her rekindling of a gentle relationship with herself.
text: Mujhe khushi hai ki us bheed bhaad aur dusron ke rishton ki uljhanon se dur, aap khud ke saath ek pyar bhara chhota sa rishta dobara banane ja rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Khud se toh rishta jaise toot hi gaya tha. Office aati thi, ghar jaati thi, aur jhoot bolti thi. Ab shayad thodi tasalli mile jab main apne bare mein bina kisi external judgement ke sochungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing this act of non-judgmental self-time as a tool for surviving structural pressures.
text: Apne roz ki itni bhaag-daud mein khud ko yeh bina kisi faisle ya guilt ke thoda waqt dena, is sakht samajik dabaav mein apne aap ko thoda sambhale rakhne ka sach mein sabse zaroori tareeqa hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you is itne supportive conversation ke liye. Mujhse aaj ye baatein share karke lagta hai ki kam se kam ek jagah main bina apna mask pehne free hoon. Ab main log off karke ghar ki duties sambhalti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to highlight her relief from the feared judgment in this safe space.
text: Aapke is bharose ke liye bohot shukriya; sach mein yeh bohot raahat ki baat hai ki yahan aap us badnaami ya judge kiye jaane ke darr se poori tarah azaad mehsoos kar payi...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon
text: Haan, bilkul sachi azaadi lagi thodi der ke liye. Parivaar ka maan bachane ke liye main har din ek jhoot jee rahi hoon, par yahan aa kar ek sach bol paayi. Apna dhyan rakhna, bye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to conclude by acknowledging the transition from her long duration of hiding to these new moments of peace.
text: Apne in chote naye aaram aur sachaai ke palo ke sath apna aage ka lamba waqt thoda asaan banayen, aur aap bhi apna khayal rakhiye.
